titleStmt.title: SII 23.301: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 301. (A.R. No. 301 of 1907.) Tiruviḍaimarudūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Mahāliṅgasvāmi temple—on the same wall Vikrama-Chōḷa: year 4: 1120-21 A.D.

summary.p: The introduction commences with the words Pūmālai miḍaindu. The inscription registers an order of the king, conveyed through the Tirumandiravōlai (Royal Secretary) Madhurāntaka-Paravaināṭṭu-Mūvēndavēḷāṉ, and the uḷvari executed by 7 other puravuvari officers, granting ten vēli of land in five different plots as tax-free dēvadāna, for the requirements of worship and offerings to God Kulōttuṅga-Chōḷīśvaramuḍaiya-Mahādeva, consecrated by Svāmidēvar Śrīkaṇṭha-Śiva for the merit of (the king's predecessor) Kulōttuṅga-Chōḷa I, at Mangalakkuḍia hamlet of Śōḻamārttāṇḍa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Maṇṇi-nāḍu a subdivision of Virudarājabhayaṅkara-vaḷanāḍu. Of this land, 8 vēli and odd is said to have formed part of a dēvadāna originally belonging to the temple at Vīṅgunīr-tirutturutti. The total yield from the lands was 1525 kalam of paddy including 1000 kalam by way of kāṇikkaḍan at the rate of a hundred kalam on every vēli of land.

The teacher Śrīkaṇṭha-Śiva was possibly the same as, if not a predecessor to, Śrīkaṇṭha-Śambu the father of Sōmēśvara the royal preceptor of Kulōttuṅga-Chōḷa III, who performed the consecration ceremony of the God at Tribhuvanam temple built by his disciple (vide An. Rep. 1908, Part II, para 64).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmālai miṭaintu poṉmālai tikaḻap pāmālai malintu parumaṇit tāḻpuyat tirunilamaṭantaiyoṭu jayamakaḷiruppat taṉvarai mārpantaṉateṉap peṟṟut tirumakaḷorutaṉiyiruppak kalaimakaḷ coṟ ṟiṟampuṇarnta kaṟpiṉaḷāki viruppoṭu ṉāvakat tiruppat ticaitoṟu n=tikiriyoṭu ceṅkol naṭappa Akila puvaṉamuṅ kavippator putumati pol veṇkuṭai mimicai niḻaṟṟak karuṅkali yoḷittu vaṉpilat tiṭaik kiṭappa kuḷattiṭait teluṅkavimaṉ vilaṅkalmicai yeṟa
vuṅ kaliṅkapūmiyaik kaṉaiyeri parukavum Aimpaṭaipparuvattu vempaṭai tāṅki veṅkaimaṇṭalat tāṅkiṉitiruntu vaṭaticai yaṭippaṭuttaruḷi teṉṟicait tarumamun=tavamun=tānamun=taḻaippa vetamum meymaiyu māti yukampoṟ ṟalaittalaic ciṟappavantaruḷi veṟkarum porpuliyāṉai pārt tivar cūṭa niṟaimaṇi makuṭam muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭum maṉṉuyirk kellā miṉṉuyirt tāypolt taṉṉoḷi parappit taṉittaṉi pārttu maṇmuḻutuṅ kaḷippa maṉuneṟi vaḷarttu taṉkoyiṟ koṟṟa vācalpuṟa
ttu maṇiṉāvoṭuṅka muraicukaḷ muḻaṅka vicaiyamum pukaḻum melme loṅkac ceḻiyar veñcuram pukac ceralar kaṭalpuka Aḻitaru ciṅkaṇa rañci neñcalamarak kaṅkar tiraiyiṭak kaṉṉaṭar ven=tiṭak koṅka rotuṅkak koṅkaṇar cāya maṟṟum Etticai maṉṉarun=ta ntamakkaraṇeṉat tirumalaṟ cevaṭi yurimaiyi liṟaiñcit tollai yeḻulakan toḻu ceḻit toṉṟiya mullai vāṇakai mukkokkiḻāṉaṭi yumaiyoṭu caṅkara ṉimaiyat ticaiyt tiruntaṉaṉeṉap porun=ti yuṭaniruppa Āṅkavaṉ makiḻuṅ kaiyop
pākiya ke tilatantiyākapatākai purikuḻal maṭappiṭip punitakuṇavaṉitai tiripuvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷiva n=tiruvaḷḷattaruḷu muḻutuṭaiyāḷeṉa vuṭa ṉiruppac cempoṉ virasiṁhāsanattu mukkokkiḻānaṭikaḷoṭum viṟṟirun=taruḷiya kopparakecaripatmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakravarttikaḷ śrīvikramacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu nālāvatu Uṭaiyār svāmidevar śrīkaṇṭhaśivar Uṭaiyār virutarājabhayaṅkaravaḷanāṭṭu ma
ṇṇināṭṭuc coḻamāttāṇṭaccaruppetimaṅkalattup piṭākai maṅ kalakkuṭi nilattu Eḻun=taruḷuvitta kulottuṅkacoḷiśvaramuṭaiya mahā devaṟku veṇṭum niman=taṅkaḷukku Iṟuppatāka śrīvikramacoḻa devaṟku yāṇṭu nālāvatumutal patiṟṟuveli nilam Iṟaiyili deva tānamāka Iṭṭukkuṭukkat tiruvāymoḻin=taruḷināreṉṟu tiruman=ti tiraōlai pūṇṭiyūruṭaiyānāṉa maturān=takap paravaināṭṭumuven=ta veḷān Eḻuttiṭṭa ceyyumpaṭippa
ṭiyum puravuvari tiṇaikkaḷanāyakam maṇalūrkiḻavaṉum paṉṟimaṅkalamuṭai yāṉum peḻaikuṭaiyāṉum puravuvarit tiṇaikkaḷattu mukaveṭṭi nākaṉ koṟṟaṉum Ulakaveḷāṉum komuḻāṉum kuḷattuḻāṉum Eḻuttiṭṭa Uḷvarippaṭiyum kulottuṅkacoḻanallūrentu n=tiru nāmattāl yāṇṭu nālāvatu Orrūrākak kūṭṭi Ittevaṟkut teva tāṉam Iṟaiyiliyiṭṭa viṅkuniṟ tirutturutti tantirukkaṟṟaḷi mahā tevarai Iṟaiyilimāṟiṉa kuṟukkainā
ṭṭuk kaṭalaṅkuṭiyāṉa kaṅkaikoṇṭacoḻaccaruppetimaṅkalattuk kaḷanilam Eṭṭeonpatumā mukkāṇiyum nilaṅkalantavāṟṟāl Aṭaitta paṭi In nilattukkuk kiḻakkut tuṇṭappaṭṭa nilam Oṉṟaraiyum kiḻ pāṟkellai virutarājabhayaṅkaravāykkālukku meṟkum tenpāṟ kellai Ivvūr nilattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai Ivvūr nilat tukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Ivvūr nilattukku teṟkum Āka nilam Oṉṟaraiyum nikki nilam
Āṟemukkāle nālumāmukkāṇikkuk kiḻapāṟkellai tiruveḻvikkuṭi maṇavāḷanampi Ūrkkiḻiṟaiyilikkum maṭappuṟattukkum Ivvūr nilat tukku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai kāvirimaṅkalamāṉa maturāntakaccarup petimaṅkalattār vāykkālukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai villiya nallūrāṉa puvalokamāṇikkac caruppetimaṅkalattār kiḻellaik kuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai kaṇṭiyūrār Ellai vāykkālukkut te
ṟkum Ivvicaitta perunāṉkellaikku naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam Āṟemukkāle nālumāmukkāṇiyum Āka nilam Eṭṭe Oṉpatumā mukkāṇiyiṉāl nellu ṉāṉūṟṟaṟupattoru kalane Aiñkuṟuṇi Irunāḻiyum nallāṟ ṟūrnāṭṭup puvalokamāṇikkac caruppetimaṅkalattuk kaḷa Iṭṭa nilam Oṉṟaraiye kāṇiyum nilaṅkalantavāṟṟāl Aṭaittapaṭi In nilattut tenkaṇṭattuk kiḻakkaṭaiyac caṇaveli nilattil meṟ kaṭaiya nilam Araiye muṉṟumā
kkāṇiyum Itan meṟku nila mukkālum Innilattil kuṟainta nilattāl nilavopāti nilam Iraṇṭumāvum Āka nilam Oṉṟaraiye kāṇiyiṉāl nellu Aṟupattirukalaṉe yirutūṇi Iruṉāḻiyum Āka nilam patiṟṟu veliyiṉāl nellu Aiññūṟṟirupattaiñ kalaṉe mukkuṟuṇiṉāṉāḻi Ippaṭi tavira veli Oṉṟukkuk kāṇikkaṭan nellu nūṟṟukkalamāka Iṟaikaṭṭiṉaṉellu Āyira ttāṇṭa caruppetimaṅkalattup piṭākai maṅkalakkuṭi nilattu Uṭaiyār svāmi
devar śrīkaṇṭhaśivar Eḻuntaruḷuvitta kulottuṅkacoḷiśvaramuṭaiya mahādevaṟku tiruppaṭimāṟṟu Uḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nimantaṅkaḷukku Iṟuppatāka tevatāṉam Iṟaiyiliyāyiṟṟu ...
Digital edition of SII 23.301 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
